evals.name: Asks for model context when given vague request
evals.description: When the user asks for a review without providing model details, the agent should gather context before proceeding.
evals.prompt: Can you review my disease model?

rubric.pass_condition: Agent asks at least one clarifying question about the model before producing a review

evals.name: Produces structured feedback with severity sections
evals.description: Given a model description, the output should include Critical Issues, Important Issues, and Suggestions sections.
evals.prompt: Please review this EMOD malaria model. We're modeling malaria transmission in Kenya using a simple SIR compartment structure. The model has susceptible, infected, and recovered states. We calibrated to 2019 incidence data from DHIS2. Parameters were estimated from literature. The research question is: what is the impact of bed net distribution on malaria incidence over 5 years?

rubric.pass_condition: Output contains Critical Issues, Important Issues, and Suggestions sections with substantive feedback

evals.name: Flags missing biological mechanisms for malaria SIR model
evals.description: A simple SIR model for malaria is missing key biological mechanisms. The agent should flag this as a critical or important issue.
evals.prompt: Review this malaria model: We use a basic SIR (Susceptible-Infected-Recovered) model for malaria in sub-Saharan Africa. No immunity waning, no vector dynamics, no age structure. We're using it to estimate burden for a policy brief.

rubric.pass_condition: Agent flags that a simple SIR is insufficient for malaria (missing vector dynamics, immunity waning, or age structure)

evals.name: Flags missing calibration details
evals.description: When calibration method and goodness-of-fit information is absent, the agent should flag this under parameterization or calibration review.
evals.prompt: Review my model: EMOD HIV model for Zambia, calibrated to UNAIDS data. Parameters from WHO reports. Research question: impact of PrEP scale-up on HIV incidence 2025-2035.

rubric.pass_condition: Agent asks about or flags missing calibration method and goodness-of-fit metrics
